title: The Long Absence
overview: Therese, a café owner, mourns the mysterious disappearance of her husband sixteen years earlier. A tramp arrives in the town and she believes him to be her husband. But he is suffering from amnesia and she tries to bring back his memory of earlier times.

trailers.title: L'inverno ti farà tornare (Une aussi longue absence) - Henri Colpi
